economic_notes: First Nation operates ferry, hovercraft, and air boat transportation services. Major capital projects include New Ferry Project ($19,873,468 contract), Wharf Reconstruction ($1,395,825), and Roads Upgrade ($7,330,571). Williams Treaty Settlement Trust consolidated at 100% with significant investment portfolio. Niigaaning Gchi Mnissing Trust holds Coldwater-Narrows settlement compensation of $88,879,967.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022. Williams Treaty Settlement Trust consolidated at 100% as sole subsidiary. Niigaaning Gchi Mnissing Trust is a trust under administration (not consolidated) with December 31 year-end; trust equity of $85,886,584. Large assets under construction balance of $31,376,847 primarily related to New Ferry Project and other infrastructure. ISC funding calculated as sum of Fixed contribution $4,670,665 + Flexible contribution $6,128,527 + Grant $471,139 + NFR Grant $4,306,983 + Set contribution $144,230 + Change in deferred balances $260,376 = $15,981,920 less reconciliation; reported federal total includes CMHC $1,378,449 and Other $185,071. Annual debt service reflects CMHC repayment $312,969 + FNFA repayment $242,181 = $555,150. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Negative interest expense in segmented totals ($-286,209) is unusual and may reflect interest earned on debt reserve funds.
